lines.english: How long had the police taken to find his bicycle?
lines.chinese: 警察花了多长时间才找到他的自行车？
lines.raw: How long had the police taken to find his bicycle? | 警察花了多长时间才找到他的自行车？

lines.english: Dan Robinson has been worried all week.
lines.chinese: 丹·罗宾逊整个星期都忧心忡忡。
lines.raw: Dan Robinson has been worried all week. | 丹·罗宾逊整个星期都忧心忡忡。

lines.english: Last Tuesday he received a letter
lines.chinese: 上周二，他收到了一封信
lines.raw: Last Tuesday he received a letter | 上周二，他收到了一封信

lines.english: from the local police.
lines.raw: from the local police. | 来自当地警察局。

lines.english: In the letter he was asked to call at the station.
lines.chinese: 信中要求他到警察局一趟。
lines.raw: In the letter he was asked to call at the station. | 信中要求他到警察局一趟。

lines.english: Dan wondered why
lines.raw: Dan wondered why | 丹想知道为什么

lines.english: he was wanted by the police,
lines.raw: he was wanted by the police, | 警察要找他，

lines.english: but he went to the station yesterday
lines.raw: but he went to the station yesterday | 但他昨天去了警察局，

lines.english: and now he is not worried anymore.
lines.raw: and now he is not worried anymore. | 现在他不再担心了。

lines.english: At the station,
lines.raw: At the station, | 在警察局，

lines.english: he was told by a smiling policeman
lines.chinese: 一位面带微笑的警察告诉他
lines.raw: he was told by a smiling policeman | 一位面带微笑的警察告诉他

lines.english: that his bicycle had been found.
lines.chinese: 他的自行车已经找到了。
lines.raw: that his bicycle had been found. | 他的自行车已经找到了。

lines.english: Five days ago, the policeman told him,
lines.raw: Five days ago, the policeman told him, | 警察告诉他，五天前，

lines.english: the bicycle was picked up in a small village
lines.chinese: 这辆自行车在一个小村庄被发现，
lines.raw: the bicycle was picked up in a small village | 这辆自行车在一个小村庄被发现，

lines.english: four hundred miles away.
lines.raw: four hundred miles away. | 距离这里四百英里。

lines.english: It is now being sent to his home by train.
lines.chinese: 现在正通过火车运往他家。
lines.raw: It is now being sent to his home by train. | 现在正通过火车运往他家。

lines.english: Dan was most surprised
lines.raw: Dan was most surprised | 丹听到这个消息时

lines.english: when he heard the news.
lines.raw: when he heard the news. | 非常惊讶。

lines.english: He was amused too,
lines.raw: He was amused too, | 他也觉得很有趣，

lines.english: because he never expected
lines.raw: because he never expected | 因为他从未想过

lines.english: the bicycle to be found.
lines.raw: the bicycle to be found. | 自行车会被找到。

lines.english: It was stolen twenty years ago
lines.chinese: 这辆自行车是二十年前被偷的，
lines.raw: It was stolen twenty years ago | 这辆自行车是二十年前被偷的，

lines.english: when Dan was a boy of fifteen!
lines.chinese: 当时丹还是个15岁的男孩！
lines.raw: when Dan was a boy of fifteen! | 当时丹还是个15岁的男孩！
